bullets: Designed a three-layer AI-assisted system (material diagnosis, document generation, revision control) converting raw student data into competitive CVs and Statements of Purpose for international study applications.

Built a Google Apps Script pipeline to automatically extract and structure student data into JSON, paired with a custom Claude Skill that counsellors use to generate first-pass drafts in minutes — replacing a manual writing process that previously took 2–4 weeks per student.
Sole designer and builder, from problem diagnosis through system architecture to implementation; projected over 40× reduction in yearly production cost upon full deployment.

Architected a LINE Official Account self-service system for a 500+ student/year programme, designing a rich-menu navigation flow that routed common student questions to 30-second video answers and eliminated per-student manual replies at scale.
Specified content requirements and directed staff production of a trend-style (TikTok/Reels-format) video library, maintaining a personable, on-brand tone across a fully standardised support flow.
Designed a two-tier escalation path, routing unresolved queries to group conference sessions, cutting 1:1 meeting volume while preserving human support for complex cases.

Partnered with Crescendo Lab, Taiwan's LINE Official Account Gold-tier technical partner, to implement the backstage system, while owning the product end-to-end: business case, system architecture, content specification and staff coordination.
Contributing to the optimisation and evaluation of Outlier's AI models as a freelance trainer.
Spearheaded the agile deployment of the company's first CRM platform, achieving an 80% increase in sales workflow efficiency.
Drove system configuration and UAT to a 90% pass rate, ensuring the new platform was production-ready before rollout.

Facilitated cross-departmental alignment across sales, finance and marketing to design and integrate the new workflow, contributing to a 25% increase in customer base through continual post-implementation enhancements.
Served as team leader for the interactive production team, managing a group of interns and collaborating to complete 4 AR and VR productions that enhanced user interaction with products.
Led the launch and streamlining of a new fashion tech news service across multimedia formats, attracting nearly 200 newsletter subscribers and achieving a 2% weekly increase in podcast audience.
Collaborated with the M5Stack team to assist in developing fashion products using their hardware and software solutions.
Assisted in delivering the "Python Basics for AI & Robotics" course at Popular Robotics, helping two team members obtain their certification.
Streamlined the social media content creation process using AI platforms.
Utilised MarketMuse and its AI tools for SEO optimisation to enhance the performance of social media content.
Leveraged the WeChat Public Accounts Platform to publish Chinese content, expanding reach to potential users.
